description: elastiq.ch is the website of Elastiq GmbH / David Aerne, showcasing computational design and creative coding projects such as Charcuterie and other color/design experiments. The site presents portfolio content and interactive web apps rather than documented developer integration products.
summary: No public developer integration surface was found for elastiq.ch; the domain appears to be a personal/portfolio site with browser-based projects, not published APIs, GraphQL, MCP, or CLI interfaces.
